TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Nr-pear_lungi
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: ira ku ccay a matuasay tayni cingra i itira i lutuk.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj a matuasaj tajni ʦiŋra i itira i ɾutuk.
S.FORM: ira ku ccay a matuasay tayni cingra i itira i lutuk.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj a matuasaj tajni ʦiŋra i itira i ɾutuk.
S.TRANSL: 有一個老人來到山上.
There was an elder coming to the mountain.

S.FORM: mikalic cingra tu ccay a kilang mipitpit cingra tu heci u kyafes mipitpit cingra i.
S.PHON: mikaɾiʦ ʦiŋra tu ʦʦaj a kiɾaŋ mipitpit ʦiŋra tu ħəʦi u kjafəs mipitpit ʦiŋra i.
S.FORM: mikalic cingra tu ccay a kilang mipitpit cingra tu heci u kyafes mipitpit cingra i.
S.PHON: mikaɾiʦ ʦiŋra tu ʦʦaj a kiɾaŋ mipitpit ʦiŋra tu ħəʦi u kjafəs mipitpit ʦiŋra i.
S.TRANSL: 他爬上一棵樹摘番石榴.
He climbed up a tree and plucked guavas.

S.FORM: matumestu ku lufuc i itini i itini lufuc nira i.
S.PHON: matuməstu ku ɾufuʦ i itini i itini ɾufuʦ nira i.
S.FORM: matumestu ku lufuc i itini i itini lufuc nira i.
S.PHON: matuməstu ku ɾufuʦ i itini i itini ɾufuʦ nira i.
S.TRANSL: 他的袋子滿了.
His bag was full.

S.FORM: maepud cingra miparu itini i fakar tuya mi pitpitan nira a heci nu kilang.
S.PHON: maəpuɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra miparu itini i fakar tuja mi pitpitan nira a ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ.
S.FORM: maepud cingra miparu itini i fakar tuya mi pitpitan nira a heci nu kilang.
S.PHON: maəpuɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra miparu itini i fakar tuja mi pitpitan nira a ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他下來把水果裝到籃子裡.
He went down and put the fruits in the basket.

S.FORM: nikawrila ira ku c'cay a wawa tu mikulisiway mita'elif tu nira a kilang i.
S.PHON: nikawriɾa ira ku ʦʡʦaj a wawa tu mikuɾisiwaj mitaʡəɾif tu nira a kiɾaŋ i.
S.FORM: nikawrila ira ku c'cay a wawa tu mikulisiway mita'elif tu nira a kilang i.
S.PHON: nikawriɾa ira ku ʦʡʦaj a wawa tu mikuɾisiwaj mitaʡəɾif tu nira a kiɾaŋ i.
S.TRANSL: 有一個騎腳踏車的小孩經過樹.
There was a child who rode a bike. He passed the tree.

S.FORM: maaraw nira kurira a matuasay mipitpit ifafa' tu heci nurira kilang.
S.PHON: maaraw nira kurira a matuasaj mipitpit ifafaʡ tu ħəʦi nurira kiɾaŋ.
S.FORM: maaraw nira kurira a matuasay mipitpit ifafa' tu heci nurira kilang.
S.PHON: maaraw nira kurira a matuasaj mipitpit ifafaʡ tu ħəʦi nurira kiɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他看到那個老人在摘水果.
He saw that that elder was picking fruits.

S.FORM: ca'ay pinengneng kurira a matuasay alahan nura wawa kura matumesaytu a paru a fakar tu heci nu na kilang paru nira padadakaw itini i kulisiw.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj pinəŋnəŋ kurira a matuasaj aɾaħan nura wawa kura matuməsajtu a paru a fakar tu ħəʦi nu na kiɾaŋ paru nira paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮakaw itini i kuɾisiw.
S.FORM: ca'ay pinengneng kurira a matuasay alahan nura wawa kura matumesaytu a paru a fakar tu heci nu na kilang paru nira padadakaw itini i kulisiw.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj pinəŋnəŋ kurira a matuasaj aɾaħan nura wawa kura matuməsajtu a paru a fakar tu ħəʦi nu na kiɾaŋ paru nira paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮakaw itini i kuɾisiw.
S.TRANSL: 老人沒看到小孩拿了一籃裝滿果實的籃子,然後還用腳踏車把它們運走.
The elder didn't see that the child took a basket that was full of fruits and that he put them on his bike and carried them away.

S.FORM: ta milaliw cingra.
S.PHON: ta miɾaɾiw ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: ta milaliw cingra.
S.PHON: ta miɾaɾiw ʦiŋra.

TRANSL.notes: 然後他(小孩子)就離開了.

S.TRANSL: 然後他 就離開了.
Then, he left.

S.FORM: ca'ay kafana kunini a matuasay.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj kafana kunini a matuasaj.
S.FORM: ca'ay kafana kunini a matuasay.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj kafana kunini a matuasaj.

TRANSL.notes: 這個老人不知道(這些事).

S.TRANSL: 這個老人不知道 .
The elder didn't know this.

S.FORM: tahira i fatad kunini a wawa ira ku saka lalitemuh nira a c'cay a fafahiyan a wawa tu mikulisiway.
S.PHON: taħira i fataɬ~ɮ kunini a wawa ira ku saka ɾaɾitəmuħ nira a ʦʡʦaj a fafaħijan a wawa tu mikuɾisiwaj.
S.FORM: tahira i fatad kunini a wawa ira ku saka lalitemuh nira a c'cay a fafahiyan a wawa tu mikulisiway.
S.PHON: taħira i fataɬ~ɮ kunini a wawa ira ku saka ɾaɾitəmuħ nira a ʦʡʦaj a fafaħijan a wawa tu mikuɾisiwaj.
S.TRANSL: 半路上,小孩遇到一個騎腳踏車的女生.
Halfway, the child met a girl who rode a bike.

S.FORM: ma tata'elif cangra i nunini a pikulisiway a fafahian kunini a wawa tu fayinayan tu mialaay tu ni talu cay i fakar a mipitpitan nira heci nu kilang.
S.PHON: ma tataʡəɾif ʦaŋra i nunini a pikuɾisiwaj a fafaħian kunini a wawa tu fajinajan tu miaɾaaj tu ni taɾu ʦaj i fakar a mipitpitan nira ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ.
S.FORM: ma tata'elif cangra i nunini a pikulisiway a fafahian kunini a wawa tu fayinayan tu mialaay tu ni talu cay i fakar a mipitpitan nira heci nu kilang.
S.PHON: ma tataʡəɾif ʦaŋra i nunini a pikuɾisiwaj a fafaħian kunini a wawa tu fajinajan tu miaɾaaj tu ni taɾu ʦaj i fakar a mipitpitan nira ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: aaa
aaa

S.FORM: ma pulin kunini a fayinayan a wawa tu mikulisiway malaklak ku nialaan nira a.
S.PHON: ma puɾin kunini a fajinajan a wawa tu mikuɾisiwaj maɾakɾak ku niaɾaan nira a.
S.FORM: ma pulin kunini a fayinayan a wawa tu mikulisiway malaklak ku nialaan nira a.
S.PHON: ma puɾin kunini a fajinajan a wawa tu mikuɾisiwaj maɾakɾak ku niaɾaan nira a.
S.TRANSL: 騎腳踏車的男孩跌倒了,他拿的東西散落一地.
The boy who rode a bike fell, and what he took were scattered.

S.FORM: miparu itini i kulisiw a fakar laklak satu kunini a heci.
S.PHON: miparu itini i kuɾisiw a fakar ɾakɾak satu kunini a ħəʦi.
S.FORM: miparu itini i kulisiw a fakar laklak satu kunini a heci.
S.PHON: miparu itini i kuɾisiw a fakar ɾakɾak satu kunini a ħəʦi.
S.TRANSL: 果實散落一地,他把它們裝到腳踏車上.
The fruits were scattered, so he put them on the bike.

S.FORM: itiya i ira ku tatuluay a wawa tuni padanghan nira a miparu kunini a wawa.
S.PHON: itija i ira ku tatuɾuaj a wawa tuni paɬ~ɮaŋħan nira a miparu kunini a wawa.
S.FORM: itiya i ira ku tatuluay a wawa tuni padanghan nira a miparu kunini a wawa.
S.PHON: itija i ira ku tatuɾuaj a wawa tuni paɬ~ɮaŋħan nira a miparu kunini a wawa.
S.TRANSL: 有三個小孩,他們幫那個孩子.
There were three children, and they helped the child.

S.FORM: pudpudhantu nira kuya heci nu kilang a miparu itini i fakar.
S.PHON: puɬ~ɮpuɬ~ɮħantu nira kuja ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ a miparu itini i fakar.
S.FORM: pudpudhantu nira kuya heci nu kilang a miparu itini i fakar.
S.PHON: puɬ~ɮpuɬ~ɮħantu nira kuja ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ a miparu itini i fakar.
S.TRANSL: 他們幫忙小孩子把水果放到籃子裡.
They helped the child put the fruits in the basket.

S.FORM: maherekitu i lumuwadtu cingra minukay.
S.PHON: maħərəkitu i ɾumuwaɬ~ɮtu ʦiŋra minukaj.
S.FORM: maherekitu i lumuwadtu cingra minukay.
S.PHON: maħərəkitu i ɾumuwaɬ~ɮtu ʦiŋra minukaj.
S.TRANSL: 完成後,他起身回家.
After it is done, he got up and went home.

S.FORM: matawal nira ku kafeng celi'han nuya mita'elifay a tatuluay a wawa i.
S.PHON: matawaɾ nira ku kafəŋ ʦəɾiʡħan nuja mitaʡəɾifaj a tatuɾuaj a wawa i.
S.FORM: matawal nira ku kafeng celi'han nuya mita'elifay a tatuluay a wawa i.
S.PHON: matawaɾ nira ku kafəŋ ʦəɾiʡħan nuja mitaʡəɾifaj a tatuɾuaj a wawa i.
S.TRANSL: 他忘了帽子,那三個小孩叫他
He forgot the hat, so the three children called him.

S.FORM: tireng sa cingra miala cingra tu pafeli' nuya tatuluay a wawa tu c'cay i cingranan a kafeng.
S.PHON: tirəŋ sa ʦiŋra miaɾa ʦiŋra tu pafəɾiʡ nuja tatuɾuaj a wawa tu ʦʡʦaj i ʦiŋranan a kafəŋ.
S.FORM: tireng sa cingra miala cingra tu pafeli' nuya tatuluay a wawa tu c'cay i cingranan a kafeng.
S.PHON: tirəŋ sa ʦiŋra miaɾa ʦiŋra tu pafəɾiʡ nuja tatuɾuaj a wawa tu ʦʡʦaj i ʦiŋranan a kafəŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 他給每個小孩一個(番石榴).

S.TRANSL: 他給每個小孩一個 .

TRANSL.notes: He gave each of the three children one (guava).

S.TRANSL: He gave each of the three children one .

S.FORM: pa pa minukaytu cingra.
S.PHON: pa pa minukajtu ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: pa pa minukaytu cingra.
S.PHON: pa pa minukajtu ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: 他回家了.
He went home.

S.FORM: maepud kuya matuasay minengneng cingra tuya fakar awaaytu ku c'cay.
S.PHON: maəpuɬ~ɮ kuja matuasaj minəŋnəŋ ʦiŋra tuja fakar awaajtu ku ʦʡʦaj.
S.FORM: maepud kuya matuasay minengneng cingra tuya fakar awaaytu ku c'cay.
S.PHON: maəpuɬ~ɮ kuja matuasaj minəŋnəŋ ʦiŋra tuja fakar awaajtu ku ʦʡʦaj.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人下來,他看到一個籃子不見了.
The elder went down and saw that one basket was gone.

S.FORM: i cima kumialaay sa'an cingra.
S.PHON: i ʦima kumiaɾaaj saʡan ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: i cima kumialaay sa'an cingra.
S.PHON: i ʦima kumiaɾaaj saʡan ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: 「誰拿了?」他這麼說.
'Who took it?', he said.

S.FORM: sa'an ira kuya tatuluay mita'elif mitatuy tuya heci nu kilang cangra a kuma'en.
S.PHON: saʡan ira kuja tatuɾuaj mitaʡəɾif mitatuj tuja ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ ʦaŋra a kumaʡən.
S.FORM: sa'an ira kuya tatuluay mita'elif mitatuy tuya heci nu kilang cangra a kuma'en.
S.PHON: saʡan ira kuja tatuɾuaj mitaʡəɾif mitatuj tuja ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ ʦaŋra a kumaʡən.
S.TRANSL: 有三個小孩經過,他們拿著水果在吃.
There were three children passing by, and they were holding and eating the fruits.

S.FORM: nengnenghan nuya matuasay unini hakini kumialaay.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan nuja matuasaj unini ħakini kumiaɾaaj.
S.FORM: nengnenghan nuya matuasay unini hakini kumialaay.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan nuja matuasaj unini ħakini kumiaɾaaj.
S.TRANSL: 老人看到,納悶著是不是他們拿的.

TRANSL.notes: The elder saw this, wondering whether they took (the guavas).

S.TRANSL: The elder saw this, wondering whether they took .

S.FORM: sa'an a minengneng itiya ta'elif satu tireng satu kunini a matuasay a miharatengtu malahelaway a nialaan nira a heci nu kilang.
S.PHON: saʡan a minəŋnəŋ itija taʡəɾif satu tirəŋ satu kunini a matuasaj a miħaratəŋtu maɾaħəɾawaj a niaɾaan nira a ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ.
S.FORM: sa'an a minengneng itiya ta'elif satu tireng satu kunini a matuasay a miharatengtu malahelaway a nialaan nira a heci nu kilang.
S.PHON: saʡan a minəŋnəŋ itija taʡəɾif satu tirəŋ satu kunini a matuasaj a miħaratəŋtu maɾaħəɾawaj a niaɾaan nira a ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: aaa
aaa

S.FORM: hatira aca ku suwal nu maku.
S.PHON: ħatira aʦa ku suwaɾ nu maku.
S.FORM: hatira aca ku suwal nu maku.
S.PHON: ħatira aʦa ku suwaɾ nu maku.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣.
That's it.
